summary: The South Bay's funding surge continues: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) and MatX (Mountain View) each closed $500M Series B rounds, while Ayar Labs (San Jose) hit $500M in Series E funding. Across the region, AI and semiconductor plays dominated March's capital influx, with 16 companies raising over $3.2B total. Meanwhile, hiring remains mostly steady, with seven South Bay firms actively recruiting.
